integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the actual application GUI rather than using terminal commands, API calls, or direct database modifications to insert the records.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent imported the customers simultaneously as requested.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the exact data provided in the TSV file.
